title: Proclamation No. 187, s. 1937
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 187

RESERVING FOR WORKINGMEN’S VILLAGE PURPOSES TWO PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE DISTRICT OF TONDO, CITY OF MANILA, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for workingmen’s village purposes, under the administration of the Secretary of Labor, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following-described parcels of the public domain, situated in the District of Tondo, City of Manila, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14947, to wit:

Lot No. 1 (lot No. 46, block No. 3007). —Beginning at a point marked “1” on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14947, N. 9° 00′ W. 673.30 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 8, Manila cadastre, thence S. 6° 55′ E. 18.95 m. to point 2; S. 3° 53′ W., 17.16 m. to point 3; S. 0° 26′ E. 2.62 m. to point 4; S. 3° 37′ W. 7.25 m. to point 5; S. 3° 37′ W. 31.53 m. to point 6; S. 0° 24′ E. 12.65 m. to point 7; N. 73° 39′ W. 4.10 m. to point 8; N. 73° 39′ W., 3.72 m. to point 9; N. 73° 39′ W. 1.48 m. to point 10; S. 7° 22′ W. 27.00 m. to point 11; S. 7° 22′ W. 10.64 m. to point 12; S. 1° 09′ W. 13.00 m. to point 13; S. 1° 09′ W. 21.69 m. to point 14; S. 48° 44′ E. 5.64 m. to point 15; S. 14° 33′ W. 5.18 m. to point 16; S. 9° 50′ W. 8.50 m. to point 17; S. 8° 13′ E. 23.45 m. to point 18; S. 1° 50′ W. 5.30 m. to point 19; S. 5° 38′ W. 28.65 m. to point 20; S. 5° 38′ W. 1.62 m. to point 21; N. 75° 08′ W. 158.54 m. to point 22; N. 0° 51′ W. 655.57 m. to point 23; S. 73° 57′ E. 68.18 m. to point 24; S. 73° 57′ E. 31.83 m. to point 26; S. 19° 28′ E. 11.21 m. to point 26; S. 19° 28′ E. 15.17 m. to point 27; S. 19° 28′ E. 0.29 m. to point 28; S. 19° 28′ E. 1.22 m. to point 29; S. 19° 28′ E. 29.25 m. to point 30; S. 11° 27′ E. 72.46 m. to point 31; S. 10° 15′ E. 53.45 m. to point 32; S. 10° 15′ E. 41.43 m. to point 33; S. 10° 15′ E. 21.16 m. to point 34; S. 10° 15′ E. 14.27 m. to point 35; S. 10° 15′ E. 21.67 m. to point 36; S. 10° 15′ E. 14.65 m. to point 37; S. 6° 55′ E. 29.67 m. to point 38; S. 6° 55′ E. 15.39 m. to point 39; S. 6° 55′ E. 37.30 m. to point 40; S. 6° 55′ E. 63.33 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 96,621.40 square meters.

Points 1, 9, 11, and 13, P. L. S. concrete monuments; points 2 and 10, old P. L„ S./B. L. concrete monuments; points 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, 18, 19, 20, 21, 26, 27, 30, and 31, old corners; points 5, 28, 29, 32, 33, 34, 35, 36, 38, 39, and 40, old P. L. S. concrete monuments; points 12, 14, and 15, old stakes; points 16 and 17, old P. L. S./B. L. monuments; points 22 and 23, stakes; points 24 and 25, intersections; point 37, old big round stone.

Bounded on the north, by Calle Herbosa; on the east, by lots Nos. 14-B and 14-D, block No. 3007 of plan Psd-1586; lot No. 39-A, block No. 3007 of plan Psd-9094; lot No. 15-A, block No. 3007 of plan Psd-9091; lots Nos. 16-A and 17-B, block No. 3007 of plan Psd-9098; lots Nos. 3-A-l, 3-B-l, 3-C-l, 3-D-l, 3-E-l, 3-F-l, and 2-A-l, block No. 3007 of plan Psd-9090; lot No. 2-B-l of plan Psd-9097; lots Nos. 2-C-l and 2-D-l, block No. 3007 of plan Psd-9090; lot No. 2-D-2, block No. 3007, Psd-9097; lots Nos. 1-B and 1-A block No. 3007 of plan Psd-9092, Calle Pacheco; lot No. 5-A-2 block No. 2776 of plan Psd-90S9; lots Nos. 5-B-2 and 5-C-2, block No. 2773 of plan Psd-9088; lot No. 4-B, block No. 2767 of plan Psd-9055; lot No. 1, block No. 2769, Calle Pilapil; and lot No. 1, block No. 2765; on the south, by Calle Perla; and on the west, by Manila Bay.

Lot No. 2 (lot No. 25, block No. 2779). —Beginning at a point marked “1” on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14947, N. 25° 58′ W. 493.10 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 8, Manila cadastre, thence S. 14° 52′ W. 140.00 m. to point 2; S. 60° 42′ E. 131.24 m. to point 3; S. 2° 32′ E. 4.01 m. to point 4; S. 2° 32′ E. 2.79 m. to point 5; S. 5° 38′ W. 2.07 m. to point 6; S. 3° 43′ E. 14.1& m. to point 7; S. 0° 59′ E. 16.23 m. to point 8; S. 6° 32′ E. 15.72 m. to point 9; S. 3° 43′ E. 26.09 m. to point 10; N. S2° 31′ W. 136.56 m. to point 11; N. 0° 51′ W. 277.55 m. to point 12; S. 75° 08′ E. 58.16 m. to point 1, point of be­ginning.

Containing an area of 19,784.80 square meters.

Points 1 and 2, big stake; point 3, old stake; points 4 to 10, inclusive, old corners; points 11 and 12, stakes.

Bounded on the northeast, by Calle Perla and lot No. 13, block No. 2779 (Magat Playground) ; on the E., by lots Nos. 13, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, and 23, block No. 2779; on the south, by Calle Moriones; and on the west, by Manila Bay.

Bearings true. Declination, variable.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14947.

Prepared: May 15, 1937.

Approved: June 16, 1937.

Note.—Lot No. 1=Additional lot No. 46, block No. 3007 of Manila cadastre No. 13, case No. 48.

Lot No. 2=Additional lot No. 25, block No. 2779 of Manila cadastre No. 13, case No. 47.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-eighth day of August, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-seven, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the second.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: ELPIDIO QUIRINO Secretary of the Interior

Source : Legislative Library, House of Representatives
